name: homebridge-alarmdotcom
description: Alarm.com plugin for Homebridge with reusable auth-token enrollment instead of manual MFA cookies.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check lib/alarmdotcom-client.js && node --check lib/mappers.js && node --check lib/platform.js && node --check lib/token-store.js && node --check bin/alarmdotcom-auth.js

author: Ezequiel dos Santos
